center.name: Marc Athanase Parfait Œillet des Murs
center.summary: Marc Athanase Parfait Œillet des Murs是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括Beaudouin's snake eagle、Southern carmine bee-eater、D'Arnaud's barbet等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | status = VU | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | taxon = Circaetus beaudouini | authority = Verreaux & Des Murs, 1862 }} Beaudouin's snake eagle (Circaetus beaudouini) is a species of snake eagle in the family Accipitridae found in the Sahel region of west Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: D'Arnaud's barbet (Trachyphonus darnaudii) is a species of bird in the family Lybiidae that is found in East Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The dot-backed antbird (Hylophylax punctulatus) is a species of bird in subfamily Thamnophilinae of family Thamnophilidae, the "typical antbirds". It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, Peru, and Venezuela.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The southern carmine bee-eater (Merops nubicoides) is a species of bee-eater found across sub-equatorial Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Zimmer's woodcreeper (Dendroplex kienerii) is a species of bird in the subfamily Dendrocolaptinae of the ovenbird family Furnariidae. It is found in Brazil, Colombia, and Peru.Remsen, J
